# saasutils_zitadel_instance (Resource)

Creates a Zitadel instance on the configured Zitadel tenant via the SystemAPI. Only `instance_name` is updatable; changing any other field forces a replacement.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `instance_name` (String)

### Optional

- `custom_domain` (String)
- `default_language` (String)
- `first_org_name` (String)
- `human` (Block List) Human owner of the new instance. Mutually exclusive with `machine`; exactly one of the two must be set. All fields are create-only. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--human))
- `machine` (Block List) Machine (service account) owner of the new instance. Mutually exclusive with `human`; exactly one of the two must be set. All fields are create-only. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--machine))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Instance ID returned by Zitadel.
- `pat` (String, Sensitive) Personal Access Token returned by Zitadel when creating the instance. Empty if not requested.

<a id="nestedblock--human"></a>
### Nested Schema for `human`

Required:

- `email` (String)
- `first_name` (String)
- `last_name` (String)
- `password` (String, Sensitive)
- `user_name` (String)

Optional:

- `is_email_verified` (Boolean)
- `password_change_required` (Boolean)
- `preferred_language` (String)


<a id="nestedblock--machine"></a>
### Nested Schema for `machine`

Required:

- `name` (String)
- `user_name` (String)

Optional:

- `personal_access_token` (Block List) If present, a Personal Access Token is issued for the machine user and returned as `pat`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--machine--personal_access_token))

<a id="nestedblock--machine--personal_access_token"></a>
### Nested Schema for `machine.personal_access_token`

Optional:

- `expiration_date` (String) RFC3339 timestamp for PAT expiration. Omit for no expiration.
